name: SIGMA - MacOS Emond Launch Daemon
author: Alejandro Ortuno, oscd.community
description: Detects additions to the Emond Launch Daemon that adversaries may use to gain persistence and elevate privileges.
query: any where (TargetFilename:"*/etc/emond.d/rules/*" and TargetFilename:"*.plist") or TargetFilename:"*/private/var/db/emondClients/*"

name: SIGMA - Startup Item File Created - MacOS
author: Alejandro Ortuno, oscd.community
description:
Detects the creation of a startup item plist file, that automatically get executed at boot initialization to establish persistence.
Adversaries may use startup items automatically executed at boot initialization to establish persistence.
Startup items execute during the final phase of the boot process and contain shell scripts or other executable files along with configuration information used by the system to determine the execution order for all startup items.
query: any where (TargetFilename like~ ("/Library/StartupItems/*", "/System/Library/StartupItems*")) and TargetFilename:"*.plist"

name: SIGMA - MacOS Scripting Interpreter AppleScript
author: Alejandro Ortuno, oscd.community
description: Detects execution of AppleScript of the macOS scripting language AppleScript.
false_positives: Application installers might contain scripts as part of the installation process.
query: any where Image:"*/osascript" and (CommandLine like~ ("* -e *", "*.scpt*", "*.js*"))

name: SIGMA - Decode Base64 Encoded Text -MacOs
author: Daniil Yugoslavskiy, oscd.community
description: Detects usage of base64 utility to decode arbitrary base64-encoded text
query: any where Image:"/usr/bin/base64" and CommandLine:"*-d*"

name: SIGMA - Binary Padding - MacOS
author: Igor Fits, Mikhail Larin, oscd.community
description: Adversaries may use binary padding to add junk data and change the on-disk representation of malware. This rule detect using dd and truncate to add a junk data to file.
query: any where (Image:"*/truncate" and CommandLine:"*-s +*") or (Image:"*/dd" and (CommandLine like~ ("*if=/dev/zero*", "*if=/dev/random*", "*if=/dev/urandom*")))

name: SIGMA - File Time Attribute Change
author: Igor Fits, Mikhail Larin, oscd.community
description: Detect file time attribute change to hide new or changes to existing files
query: any where Image:"*/touch" and (CommandLine like~ ("*-t*", "*-acmr*", "*-d*", "*-r*"))

name: SIGMA - Hidden Flag Set On File/Directory Via Chflags - MacOS
author: Omar Khaled (@beacon_exe)
description:
Detects the execution of the "chflags" utility with the "hidden" flag, in order to hide files on MacOS.
When a file or directory has this hidden flag set, it becomes invisible to the default file listing commands and in graphical file browsers.
false_positives: Legitimate usage of chflags by administrators and users.
query: any where Image:"*/chflags" and CommandLine:"*hidden *"

name: SIGMA - Indicator Removal on Host - Clear Mac System Logs
author: remotephone, oscd.community
description: Detects deletion of local audit logs

subtechnique.name: Clear Linux or Mac System Logs

query: any where (Image like~ ("*/rm", "*/unlink", "*/shred")) and (CommandLine:"*/var/log*" or (CommandLine:"*/Users/*" and CommandLine:"*/Library/Logs/*"))

name: SIGMA - Clipboard Data Collection Via OSAScript
author: Sohan G (D4rkCiph3r)
description: Detects possible collection of data from the clipboard via execution of the osascript binary
query: any where CommandLine:"*osascript*" and CommandLine:"* -e *" and CommandLine:"*clipboard*"

name: SIGMA - Creation Of A Local User Account
author: Alejandro Ortuno, oscd.community
description: Detects the creation of a new user account. Such accounts may be used for persistence that do not require persistent remote access tools to be deployed on the system.
query: any where (Image:"*/dscl" and CommandLine:"*create*") or (Image:"*/sysadminctl" and CommandLine:"*addUser*")

name: SIGMA - Hidden User Creation
author: Daniil Yugoslavskiy, oscd.community
description: Detects creation of a hidden user account on macOS (UserID < 500) or with IsHidden option
query: any where ((Image:"*/dscl" and CommandLine:"*create*") and (CommandLine:"*UniqueID*" and CommandLine regex~ "([0-9]|[1-9][0-9]|[1-4][0-9]{2})")) or ((Image:"*/dscl" and CommandLine:"*create*") and (CommandLine:"*IsHidden*" and (CommandLine like~ ("*true*", "*yes*", "*1*"))))

name: SIGMA - Credentials from Password Stores - Keychain
author: Tim Ismilyaev, oscd.community, Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
description: Detects passwords dumps from Keychain
query: any where (Image:"/usr/bin/security" and (CommandLine like~ ("*find-certificate*", "* export *"))) or (CommandLine like~ ("* dump-keychain *", "* login-keychain *"))

name: SIGMA - System Integrity Protection (SIP) Disabled
author: Joseliyo Sanchez, @Joseliyo_Jstnk
description: Detects the use of csrutil to disable the Configure System Integrity Protection (SIP). This technique is used in post-exploit scenarios.
query: any where Image:"*/csrutil" and CommandLine:"*disable*"

name: SIGMA - System Integrity Protection (SIP) Enumeration
author: Joseliyo Sanchez, @Joseliyo_Jstnk
description: Detects the use of csrutil to view the Configure System Integrity Protection (SIP) status. This technique is used in post-exploit scenarios.
query: any where Image:"*/csrutil" and CommandLine:"*status*"

name: SIGMA - Disable Security Tools
author: Daniil Yugoslavskiy, oscd.community
description: Detects disabling security tools
query: any where ((Image:"/bin/launchctl" and CommandLine:"*unload*") and (CommandLine like~ ("*com.objective-see.lulu.plist*", "*com.objective-see.blockblock.plist*", "*com.google.santad.plist*", "*com.carbonblack.defense.daemon.plist*", "*com.carbonblack.daemon.plist*", "*at.obdev.littlesnitchd.plist*", "*com.tenablesecurity.nessusagent.plist*", "*com.opendns.osx.RoamingClientConfigUpdater.plist*", "*com.crowdstrike.falcond.plist*", "*com.crowdstrike.userdaemon.plist*", "*osquery*", "*filebeat*", "*auditbeat*", "*packetbeat*", "*td-agent*"))) or (Image:"/usr/sbin/spctl" and CommandLine:"*disable*")

name: SIGMA - User Added To Admin Group Via Dscl
author: Sohan G (D4rkCiph3r)
description: Detects attempts to create and add an account to the admin group via "dscl"
query: any where Image:"*/dscl" and (CommandLine:"* -append *" and CommandLine:"* /Groups/admin *" and CommandLine:"* GroupMembership *")

name: SIGMA - User Added To Admin Group Via DseditGroup
author: Sohan G (D4rkCiph3r)
description: Detects attempts to create and/or add an account to the admin group, thus granting admin privileges.
query: any where Image:"*/dseditgroup" and (CommandLine:"* -o edit *" and CommandLine:"* -a *" and CommandLine:"* -t user*" and CommandLine:"*admin*")

name: SIGMA - Root Account Enable Via Dsenableroot
author: Sohan G (D4rkCiph3r)
description: Detects attempts to enable the root account via "dsenableroot"
query: any where Image:"*/dsenableroot" and (not CommandLine:"* -d *")

name: SIGMA - File and Directory Discovery - MacOS
author: Daniil Yugoslavskiy, oscd.community
description: Detects usage of system utilities to discover files and directories
query: any where (Image:"/usr/bin/file" and CommandLine regex~ "(.){200,}") or (Image:"/bin/ls" and CommandLine:"*-R*") or Image:"/usr/bin/find" or Image:"/usr/bin/mdfind" or Image:"/tree"

name: SIGMA - Credentials In Files
author: Igor Fits, Mikhail Larin, oscd.community
description: Detecting attempts to extract passwords with grep and laZagne
query: any where (Image:"*/grep" and CommandLine:"*password*") or CommandLine:"*laZagne*"

name: SIGMA - GUI Input Capture - macOS
author: remotephone, oscd.community
description: Detects attempts to use system dialog prompts to capture user credentials
query: any where Image:"/usr/sbin/osascript" and (CommandLine:"*-e*" and CommandLine:"*display*" and CommandLine:"*dialog*" and CommandLine:"*answer*") and (CommandLine like~ ("*admin*", "*administrator*", "*authenticate*", "*authentication*", "*credentials*", "*pass*", "*password*", "*unlock*"))

name: SIGMA - Disk Image Creation Via Hdiutil - MacOS
author: Omar Khaled (@beacon_exe)
description: Detects the execution of the hdiutil utility in order to create a disk image.
false_positives: Legitimate usage of hdiutil by administrators and users.
query: any where Image:"*/hdiutil" and CommandLine:"*create*"

name: SIGMA - Disk Image Mounting Via Hdiutil - MacOS
author: Omar Khaled (@beacon_exe)
description: Detects the execution of the hdiutil utility in order to mount disk images.
false_positives: Legitimate usage of hdiutil by administrators and users.
query: any where Image:"*/hdiutil" and (CommandLine like~ ("*attach *", "*mount *"))

name: SIGMA - Suspicious Installer Package Child Process
author: Sohan G (D4rkCiph3r)
description: Detects the execution of suspicious child processes from macOS installer package parent process. This includes osascript, JXA, curl and wget amongst other interpreters
false_positives: Legitimate software uses the scripts (preinstall, postinstall)
query: any where (ParentImage like~ ("*/package_script_service", "*/installer")) and (Image like~ ("*/sh", "*/bash", "*/dash", "*/python", "*/ruby", "*/perl", "*/php", "*/javascript", "*/osascript", "*/tclsh", "*/curl", "*/wget")) and (CommandLine like~ ("*preinstall*", "*postinstall*"))

name: SIGMA - System Information Discovery Using Ioreg
author: Joseliyo Sanchez, @Joseliyo_Jstnk
description:
Detects the use of "ioreg" which will show I/O Kit registry information.
This process is used for system information discovery.
It has been observed in-the-wild by calling this process directly or using bash and grep to look for specific strings.
query: any where (Image:"*/ioreg" or CommandLine:"*ioreg*") and (CommandLine like~ ("*-l*", "*-c*")) and (CommandLine like~ ("*AppleAHCIDiskDriver*", "*IOPlatformExpertDevice*", "*Oracle*", "*Parallels*", "*USB Vendor Name*", "*VirtualBox*", "*VMware*"))

name: SIGMA - JAMF MDM Potential Suspicious Child Process
author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
description: Detects potential suspicious child processes of "jamf". Could be a sign of potential abuse of Jamf as a C2 server as seen by Typhon MythicAgent.
false_positives: Legitimate execution of custom scripts or commands by Jamf administrators. Apply additional filters accordingly
query: any where ParentImage:"*/jamf" and (Image like~ ("*/bash", "*/sh"))

name: SIGMA - JAMF MDM Execution
author: Jay Pandit
description: Detects execution of the "jamf" binary to create user accounts and run commands. For example, the binary can be abused by attackers on the system in order to bypass security controls or remove application control polices.
false_positives: Legitimate use of the JAMF CLI tool by IT support and administrators
query: any where Image:"*/jamf" and (CommandLine like~ ("*createAccount*", "*manage*", "*removeFramework*", "*removeMdmProfile*", "*resetPassword*", "*setComputerName*"))

name: SIGMA - JXA In-memory Execution Via OSAScript
author: Sohan G (D4rkCiph3r)
description: Detects possible malicious execution of JXA in-memory via OSAScript
query: any where (CommandLine:"*osascript*" and CommandLine:"* -e *" and CommandLine:"*eval*" and CommandLine:"*NSData.dataWithContentsOfURL*") and ((CommandLine:"* -l *" and CommandLine:"*JavaScript*") or CommandLine:"*.js*")

name: SIGMA - Launch Agent/Daemon Execution Via Launchctl
author: Pratinav Chandra
description: Detects the execution of programs as Launch Agents or Launch Daemons using launchctl on macOS.
false_positives: Legitimate administration activities is expected to trigger false positives. Investigate the command line being passed to determine if the service or launch agent are suspicious.
query: any where Image:"*/launchctl" and (CommandLine like~ ("*submit*", "*load*", "*start*"))

name: SIGMA - Local System Accounts Discovery - MacOs
author: Alejandro Ortuno, oscd.community
description: Detects enumeration of local systeam accounts on MacOS
query: any where (Image:"*/dscl" and (CommandLine:"*list*" and CommandLine:"*/users*")) or (Image:"*/dscacheutil" and (CommandLine:"*-q*" and CommandLine:"*user*")) or CommandLine:"*'x:0:'*" or (Image:"*/cat" and (CommandLine like~ ("*/etc/passwd*", "*/etc/sudoers*"))) or Image:"*/id" or (Image:"*/lsof" and CommandLine:"*-u*")

name: SIGMA - Local Groups Discovery - MacOs
author: Ömer Günal, Alejandro Ortuno, oscd.community
description: Detects enumeration of local system groups
query: any where (Image:"*/dscacheutil" and (CommandLine:"*-q*" and CommandLine:"*group*")) or (Image:"*/cat" and CommandLine:"*/etc/group*") or (Image:"*/dscl" and (CommandLine:"*-list*" and CommandLine:"*/groups*"))

name: SIGMA - MacOS Network Service Scanning
author: Alejandro Ortuno, oscd.community
description: Detects enumeration of local or remote network services.
query: any where ((Image like~ ("*/nc", "*/netcat")) and (not CommandLine:"*l*")) or (Image like~ ("*/nmap", "*/telnet"))

name: SIGMA - Network Sniffing - MacOs
author: Alejandro Ortuno, oscd.community
description:
Detects the usage of tooling to sniff network traffic.
An adversary may place a network interface into promiscuous mode to passively access data in transit over the network, or use span ports to capture a larger amount of data.
query: any where Image like~ ("*/tcpdump", "*/tshark")

name: SIGMA - File Download Via Nscurl - MacOS
author: Daniel Cortez
description: Detects the execution of the nscurl utility in order to download files.
false_positives: Legitimate usage of nscurl by administrators and users.
query: any where Image:"*/nscurl" and (CommandLine like~ ("*--download *", "*--download-directory *", "*--output *", "*-dir *", "*-dl *", "*-ld*", "*-o *"))

name: SIGMA - Suspicious Microsoft Office Child Process - MacOS
author: Sohan G (D4rkCiph3r)
description: Detects suspicious child processes spawning from microsoft office suite applications such as word or excel. This could indicates malicious macro execution
query: any where (ParentImage like~ ("*Microsoft Word*", "*Microsoft Excel*", "*Microsoft PowerPoint*", "*Microsoft OneNote*")) and (Image like~ ("*/bash", "*/curl", "*/dash", "*/fish", "*/osacompile", "*/osascript", "*/sh", "*/zsh", "*/python", "*/python3", "*/wget"))

name: SIGMA - OSACompile Run-Only Execution
author: Sohan G (D4rkCiph3r)
description: Detects potential suspicious run-only executions compiled using OSACompile
query: any where CommandLine:"*osacompile*" and CommandLine:"* -x *" and CommandLine:"* -e *"

name: SIGMA - Payload Decoded and Decrypted via Built-in Utilities
author: Tim Rauch (rule), Elastic (idea)
description: Detects when a built-in utility is used to decode and decrypt a payload after a macOS disk image (DMG) is executed. Malware authors may attempt to evade detection and trick users into executing malicious code by encoding and encrypting their payload and placing it in a disk image file. This behavior is consistent with adware or malware families such as Bundlore and Shlayer.
query: any where Image:"*/openssl" and (CommandLine:"*/Volumes/*" and CommandLine:"*enc*" and CommandLine:"*-base64*" and CommandLine:"* -d *")

name: SIGMA - Potential Persistence Via PlistBuddy
author: Sohan G (D4rkCiph3r)
description: Detects potential persistence activity using LaunchAgents or LaunchDaemons via the PlistBuddy utility
query: any where Image:"*/PlistBuddy" and (CommandLine:"*RunAtLoad*" and CommandLine:"*true*") and (CommandLine like~ ("*LaunchAgents*", "*LaunchDaemons*"))

name: SIGMA - Remote Access Tool - Potential MeshAgent Execution - MacOS
author: Norbert Jaśniewicz (AlphaSOC)
description:
Detects potential execution of MeshAgent which is a tool used for remote access.
Historical data shows that threat actors rename MeshAgent binary to evade detection.
Matching command lines with the '--meshServiceName' argument can indicate that the MeshAgent is being used for remote access.
query: any where CommandLine:"*--meshServiceName*"

name: SIGMA - Remote Access Tool - Renamed MeshAgent Execution - MacOS
author: Norbert Jaśniewicz (AlphaSOC)
description:
Detects the execution of a renamed instance of the Remote Monitoring and Management (RMM) tool, MeshAgent.
RMM tools such as MeshAgent are commonly utilized by IT administrators for legitimate remote support and system management.
However, malicious actors may exploit these tools by renaming them to bypass detection mechanisms, enabling unauthorized access and control over compromised systems.
query: any where (CommandLine:"*--meshServiceName*" or OriginalFileName:"*meshagent*") and (not (Image like~ ("*/meshagent", "*/meshagent_osx64")))

name: SIGMA - Remote Access Tool - Team Viewer Session Started On MacOS Host
author: Josh Nickels, Qi Nan
description:
Detects the command line executed when TeamViewer starts a session started by a remote host.
Once a connection has been started, an investigator can verify the connection details by viewing the "incoming_connections.txt" log file in the TeamViewer folder.
query: any where ParentImage:"*/TeamViewer_Service" and Image:"*/TeamViewer_Desktop" and CommandLine:"*/TeamViewer_Desktop --IPCport 5939 --Module 1"

name: SIGMA - Macos Remote System Discovery
author: Alejandro Ortuno, oscd.community
description: Detects the enumeration of other remote systems.

name: SIGMA - Scheduled Cron Task/Job - MacOs
author: Alejandro Ortuno, oscd.community
description: Detects abuse of the cron utility to perform task scheduling for initial or recurring execution of malicious code. Detection will focus on crontab jobs uploaded from the tmp folder.
query: any where Image:"*/crontab" and CommandLine:"*/tmp/*"

name: SIGMA - Screen Capture - macOS
author: remotephone, oscd.community
description: Detects attempts to use screencapture to collect macOS screenshots
query: any where Image:"/usr/sbin/screencapture"

name: SIGMA - Security Software Discovery - MacOs
author: Daniil Yugoslavskiy, oscd.community
description: Detects usage of system utilities (only grep for now) to discover security software discovery
query: any where Image:"/usr/bin/grep" and ((CommandLine like~ ("*nessusd*", "*santad*", "*CbDefense*", "*falcond*", "*td-agent*", "*packetbeat*", "*filebeat*", "*auditbeat*", "*osqueryd*", "*BlockBlock*", "*LuLu*")) or (CommandLine:"*Little*" and CommandLine:"*Snitch*"))

name: SIGMA - Space After Filename - macOS
author: remotephone
description: Detects attempts to masquerade as legitimate files by adding a space to the end of the filename.
false_positives: Mistyped commands or legitimate binaries named to match the pattern
query: any where CommandLine:"* " or Image:"* "

name: SIGMA - Split A File Into Pieces
author: Igor Fits, Mikhail Larin, oscd.community
description: Detection use of the command "split" to split files into parts and possible transfer.
query: any where Image:"*/split"

name: SIGMA - Osacompile Execution By Potentially Suspicious Applet/Osascript
author: Sohan G (D4rkCiph3r), Red Canary (Idea)
description: Detects potential suspicious applet or osascript executing "osacompile".
query: any where (ParentImage like~ ("*/applet", "*/osascript")) and CommandLine:"*osacompile*"

name: SIGMA - Suspicious Browser Child Process - MacOS
author: Sohan G (D4rkCiph3r)
description: Detects suspicious child processes spawned from browsers. This could be a result of a potential web browser exploitation.
false_positives: Legitimate browser install, update and recovery scripts
query: any where ((ParentImage like~ ("*com.apple.WebKit.WebContent*", "*firefox*", "*Google Chrome Helper*", "*Google Chrome*", "*Microsoft Edge*", "*Opera*", "*Safari*", "*Tor Browser*")) and (Image like~ ("*/bash", "*/curl", "*/dash", "*/ksh", "*/osascript", "*/perl", "*/php", "*/pwsh", "*/python", "*/sh", "*/tcsh", "*/wget", "*/zsh"))) and (not (CommandLine:"*--defaults-torrc*" or CommandLine:"*/Library/Application Support/Microsoft/MAU*/Microsoft AutoUpdate.app/Contents/MacOS/msupdate*" or ((ParentImage like~ ("*Google Chrome Helper*", "*Google Chrome*")) and (CommandLine like~ ("*/Volumes/Google Chrome/Google Chrome.app/Contents/Frameworks/*/Resources/install.sh*", "*/Applications/Google Chrome.app/Contents/Frameworks/Google Chrome Framework.framework/*/Resources/keystone_promote_preflight.sh*", "*/Applications/Google Chrome.app/Contents/Frameworks/Google Chrome Framework.framework/*/Resources/keystone_promote_postflight.sh*"))) or (ParentImage:"*Microsoft Edge*" and (CommandLine like~ ("*IOPlatformExpertDevice*", "*hw.model*"))) or ((ParentImage like~ ("*Google Chrome Helper*", "*Google Chrome*")) and (CommandLine:"*/Users/*" and CommandLine:"*/Library/Application Support/Google/Chrome/recovery/*" and CommandLine:"*/ChromeRecovery*")))) and (not ((?CommandLine == null) or CommandLine==""))

name: SIGMA - Suspicious Execution via macOS Script Editor
author: Tim Rauch (rule), Elastic (idea)
description: Detects when the macOS Script Editor utility spawns an unusual child process.
query: any where ParentImage:"*/Script Editor" and ((Image like~ ("*/curl", "*/bash", "*/sh", "*/zsh", "*/dash", "*/fish", "*/osascript", "*/mktemp", "*/chmod", "*/php", "*/nohup", "*/openssl", "*/plutil", "*/PlistBuddy", "*/xattr", "*/sqlite", "*/funzip", "*/popen")) or (Image like~ ("*python*", "*perl*")))

name: SIGMA - Potential Discovery Activity Using Find - MacOS
author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
description: Detects usage of "find" binary in a suspicious manner to perform discovery
query: any where Image:"*/find" and (CommandLine like~ ("*-perm -4000*", "*-perm -2000*", "*-perm 0777*", "*-perm -222*", "*-perm -o w*", "*-perm -o x*", "*-perm -u=s*", "*-perm -g=s*"))

name: SIGMA - Suspicious History File Operations
author: Mikhail Larin, oscd.community
description: Detects commandline operations on shell history files
query: any where CommandLine like~ ("*.bash_history*", "*.zsh_history*", "*.zhistory*", "*.history*", "*.sh_history*", "*fish_history*")

name: SIGMA - Potential In-Memory Download And Compile Of Payloads
author: Sohan G (D4rkCiph3r), Red Canary (idea)
description: Detects potential in-memory downloading and compiling of applets using curl and osacompile as seen used by XCSSET malware
query: any where CommandLine:"*osacompile*" and CommandLine:"*curl*"

name: SIGMA - Suspicious MacOS Firmware Activity
author: Austin Songer @austinsonger
description: Detects when a user manipulates with Firmward Password on MacOS. NOTE - this command has been disabled on silicon-based apple computers.
query: any where Image:"/usr/sbin/firmwarepasswd" and (CommandLine like~ ("*setpasswd*", "*full*", "*delete*", "*check*"))

name: SIGMA - System Network Discovery - macOS
author: remotephone, oscd.community
description: Detects enumeration of local network configuration
query: any where ((Image like~ ("*/arp", "*/ifconfig", "*/netstat", "*/networksetup", "*/socketfilterfw")) or (Image:"/usr/bin/defaults" and (CommandLine:"*/Library/Preferences/com.apple.alf*" and CommandLine:"*read*"))) and (not ParentImage:"*/wifivelocityd")

name: SIGMA - System Information Discovery Using sw_vers
author: Joseliyo Sanchez, @Joseliyo_Jstnk
description: Detects the use of "sw_vers" for system information discovery
query: any where Image:"*/sw_vers" and (CommandLine like~ ("*-buildVersion*", "*-productName*", "*-productVersion*"))

name: SIGMA - User Added To Admin Group Via Sysadminctl
author: Sohan G (D4rkCiph3r)
description: Detects attempts to create and add an account to the admin group via "sysadminctl"
query: any where Image:"*/sysadminctl" and (CommandLine:"* -addUser *" and CommandLine:"* -admin *")

name: SIGMA - Guest Account Enabled Via Sysadminctl
author: Sohan G (D4rkCiph3r)
description: Detects attempts to enable the guest account using the sysadminctl utility
query: any where Image:"*/sysadminctl" and (CommandLine:"* -guestAccount*" and CommandLine:"* on*")

name: SIGMA - System Information Discovery Via Sysctl - MacOS
author: Pratinav Chandra
description:
Detects the execution of "sysctl" with specific arguments that have been used by threat actors and malware. It provides system hardware information.
This process is primarily used to detect and avoid virtualization and analysis environments.
query: any where (Image:"*/sysctl" or CommandLine:"*sysctl*") and (CommandLine like~ ("*hw.*", "*kern.*", "*machdep.*"))

name: SIGMA - System Network Connections Discovery - MacOs
author: Daniil Yugoslavskiy, oscd.community
description: Detects usage of system utilities to discover system network connections
query: any where Image like~ ("*/who", "*/w", "*/last", "*/lsof", "*/netstat")

name: SIGMA - System Information Discovery Using System_Profiler
author: Stephen Lincoln `@slincoln_aiq` (AttackIQ)
description:
Detects the execution of "system_profiler" with specific "Data Types" that have been seen being used by threat actors and malware. It provides system hardware and software configuration information.
This process is primarily used for system information discovery. However, "system_profiler" can also be used to determine if virtualization software is being run for defense evasion purposes.
query: any where (Image:"*/system_profiler" or CommandLine:"*system_profiler*") and (CommandLine like~ ("*SPApplicationsDataType*", "*SPHardwareDataType*", "*SPNetworkDataType*", "*SPUSBDataType*"))

name: SIGMA - System Shutdown/Reboot - MacOs
author: Igor Fits, Mikhail Larin, oscd.community
description: Adversaries may shutdown/reboot systems to interrupt access to, or aid in the destruction of, those systems.
query: any where Image like~ ("*/shutdown", "*/reboot", "*/halt")

name: SIGMA - Potential Base64 Decoded From Images
author: Joseliyo Sanchez, @Joseliyo_Jstnk
description: Detects the use of tail to extract bytes at an offset from an image and then decode the base64 value to create a new file with the decoded content. The detected execution is a bash one-liner.
query: any where Image:"*/bash" and (CommandLine:"*tail*" and CommandLine:"*-c*") and (CommandLine:"*base64*" and CommandLine:"*-d*" and CommandLine:"*>*") and (CommandLine like~ ("*.avif*", "*.gif*", "*.jfif*", "*.jpeg*", "*.jpg*", "*.pjp*", "*.pjpeg*", "*.png*", "*.svg*", "*.webp*"))

name: SIGMA - Time Machine Backup Deletion Attempt Via Tmutil - MacOS
author: Pratinav Chandra
description:
Detects deletion attempts of MacOS Time Machine backups via the native backup utility "tmutil".
An adversary may perform this action before launching a ransonware attack to prevent the victim from restoring their files.
query: any where (Image:"*/tmutil" or CommandLine:"*tmutil*") and CommandLine:"*delete*"

name: SIGMA - Time Machine Backup Disabled Via Tmutil - MacOS
author: Pratinav Chandra
description:
Detects disabling of Time Machine (Apple's automated backup utility software) via the native macOS backup utility "tmutil".
An attacker can use this to prevent backups from occurring.
query: any where (Image:"*/tmutil" or CommandLine:"*tmutil*") and CommandLine:"*disable*"

name: SIGMA - New File Exclusion Added To Time Machine Via Tmutil - MacOS
author: Pratinav Chandra
description:
Detects the addition of a new file or path exclusion to MacOS Time Machine via the "tmutil" utility.
An adversary could exclude a path from Time Machine backups to prevent certain files from being backed up.
query: any where (Image:"*/tmutil" or CommandLine:"*tmutil*") and CommandLine:"*addexclusion*"

name: SIGMA - Potential WizardUpdate Malware Infection
author: Tim Rauch (rule), Elastic (idea)
description: Detects the execution traces of the WizardUpdate malware. WizardUpdate is a macOS trojan that attempts to infiltrate macOS machines to steal data and it is associated with other types of malicious payloads, increasing the chances of multiple infections on a device.
query: any where (Image:"*/sh" and (CommandLine:"*=$(curl *" and CommandLine:"*eval*")) or (Image:"*/curl" and CommandLine:"*_intermediate_agent_*")

name: SIGMA - Gatekeeper Bypass via Xattr
author: Daniil Yugoslavskiy, oscd.community
description: Detects macOS Gatekeeper bypass via xattr utility
query: any where Image:"*/xattr" and (CommandLine:"*-d*" and CommandLine:"*com.apple.quarantine*")

name: SIGMA - Potential XCSSET Malware Infection
author: Tim Rauch (rule), Elastic (idea)
description: Identifies the execution traces of the XCSSET malware. XCSSET is a macOS trojan that primarily spreads via Xcode projects and maliciously modifies applications. Infected users are also vulnerable to having their credentials, accounts, and other vital data stolen.
query: any where ((ParentImage:"*/bash" and Image:"*/curl" and (CommandLine like~ ("*/sys/log.php*", "*/sys/prepod.php*", "*/sys/bin/Pods*"))) and CommandLine:"*https://*") or ((ParentImage:"*/bash" and Image:"*/osacompile" and (CommandLine:"*/Users/*" and CommandLine:"*/Library/Group Containers/*")) or (ParentImage:"*/bash" and Image:"*/plutil" and (CommandLine:"*LSUIElement*" and CommandLine:"*/Users/*" and CommandLine:"*/Library/Group Containers/*")) or (Image:"*/zip" and (CommandLine:"*-r*" and CommandLine:"*/Users/*" and CommandLine:"*/Library/Group Containers/*")))
